name: Miete pro qm
query:
SELECT
    wohnung,
    `größe`,
    miete,
    ROUND(miete / NULLIF(`größe`, 0), 2) AS miete_pro_qm,
    betriebskosten,
    heizkosten,
    untermietzuschlag,
    (miete + betriebskosten + heizkosten + untermietzuschlag) AS bruttomiete,
    ROUND((miete + betriebskosten + heizkosten + untermietzuschlag) / NULLIF(`größe`, 0), 2) AS bruttomiete_pro_qm
FROM (
SELECT
    w.name AS wohnung,
    COALESCE(sm_miete.miete, 0) AS miete,
    wz.`größe`,
    COALESCE(sm_bk.miete, 0) AS betriebskosten,
    COALESCE(sm_hk.miete, 0) AS heizkosten,
    COALESCE(sm_um.miete, 0) AS untermietzuschlag
FROM
    `tabMietvertrag` mv
JOIN
    `tabWohnung` w ON mv.wohnung = w.name
LEFT JOIN
    `tabStaffelmiete` sm_miete ON sm_miete.name = (
        SELECT sm2.name
        FROM `tabStaffelmiete` sm2
        WHERE sm2.parent = mv.name
            AND sm2.parenttype = 'Mietvertrag'
            AND sm2.parentfield = 'miete'
            AND sm2.von <= CURDATE()
        ORDER BY sm2.von DESC, sm2.idx DESC, sm2.name DESC
        LIMIT 1
    )
LEFT JOIN
    `tabStaffelmiete` sm_bk ON sm_bk.name = (
        SELECT sm2.name
        FROM `tabStaffelmiete` sm2
        WHERE sm2.parent = mv.name
            AND sm2.parenttype = 'Mietvertrag'
            AND sm2.parentfield = 'betriebskosten'
            AND sm2.von <= CURDATE()
        ORDER BY sm2.von DESC, sm2.idx DESC, sm2.name DESC
        LIMIT 1
    )
LEFT JOIN
    `tabStaffelmiete` sm_hk ON sm_hk.name = (
        SELECT sm2.name
        FROM `tabStaffelmiete` sm2
        WHERE sm2.parent = mv.name
            AND sm2.parenttype = 'Mietvertrag'
            AND sm2.parentfield = 'heizkosten'
            AND sm2.von <= CURDATE()
        ORDER BY sm2.von DESC, sm2.idx DESC, sm2.name DESC
        LIMIT 1
    )
LEFT JOIN
    `tabStaffelmiete` sm_um ON sm_um.name = (
        SELECT sm2.name
        FROM `tabStaffelmiete` sm2
        WHERE sm2.parent = mv.name
            AND sm2.parenttype = 'Mietvertrag'
            AND sm2.parentfield = 'untermietzuschlag'
            AND sm2.von <= CURDATE()
        ORDER BY sm2.von DESC, sm2.idx DESC, sm2.name DESC
        LIMIT 1
    )
JOIN
    `tabWohnungszustand` wz ON wz.name = (
        SELECT wz2.name
        FROM `tabWohnungszustand` wz2
        WHERE wz2.wohnung = w.name
            AND wz2.ab <= CURDATE()
        ORDER BY wz2.ab DESC, wz2.modified DESC, wz2.name DESC
        LIMIT 1
    )
WHERE
    w.immobilie = %(immobilie)s
    AND (mv.von IS NULL OR mv.von <= CURDATE())
    AND (mv.bis IS NULL OR mv.bis >= CURDATE())
) base
UNION ALL
SELECT
    'Summe' AS wohnung,
    SUM(`größe`) AS `größe`,
    SUM(miete) AS miete,
    ROUND(SUM(miete) / NULLIF(SUM(`größe`), 0), 2) AS miete_pro_qm,
    SUM(betriebskosten) AS betriebskosten,
    SUM(heizkosten) AS heizkosten,
    SUM(untermietzuschlag) AS untermietzuschlag,
    (SUM(miete) + SUM(betriebskosten) + SUM(heizkosten) + SUM(untermietzuschlag)) AS bruttomiete,
    ROUND((SUM(miete) + SUM(betriebskosten) + SUM(heizkosten) + SUM(untermietzuschlag)) / NULLIF(SUM(`größe`), 0), 2) AS bruttomiete_pro_qm
FROM (
SELECT
    w.name AS wohnung,
    COALESCE(sm_miete.miete, 0) AS miete,
    wz.`größe`,
    COALESCE(sm_bk.miete, 0) AS betriebskosten,
    COALESCE(sm_hk.miete, 0) AS heizkosten,
    COALESCE(sm_um.miete, 0) AS untermietzuschlag
FROM
    `tabMietvertrag` mv
JOIN
    `tabWohnung` w ON mv.wohnung = w.name
LEFT JOIN
    `tabStaffelmiete` sm_miete ON sm_miete.name = (
        SELECT sm2.name
        FROM `tabStaffelmiete` sm2
        WHERE sm2.parent = mv.name
            AND sm2.parenttype = 'Mietvertrag'
            AND sm2.parentfield = 'miete'
            AND sm2.von <= CURDATE()
        ORDER BY sm2.von DESC, sm2.idx DESC, sm2.name DESC
        LIMIT 1
    )
LEFT JOIN
    `tabStaffelmiete` sm_bk ON sm_bk.name = (
        SELECT sm2.name
        FROM `tabStaffelmiete` sm2
        WHERE sm2.parent = mv.name
            AND sm2.parenttype = 'Mietvertrag'
            AND sm2.parentfield = 'betriebskosten'
            AND sm2.von <= CURDATE()
        ORDER BY sm2.von DESC, sm2.idx DESC, sm2.name DESC
        LIMIT 1
    )
LEFT JOIN
    `tabStaffelmiete` sm_hk ON sm_hk.name = (
        SELECT sm2.name
        FROM `tabStaffelmiete` sm2
        WHERE sm2.parent = mv.name
            AND sm2.parenttype = 'Mietvertrag'
            AND sm2.parentfield = 'heizkosten'
            AND sm2.von <= CURDATE()
        ORDER BY sm2.von DESC, sm2.idx DESC, sm2.name DESC
        LIMIT 1
    )
LEFT JOIN
    `tabStaffelmiete` sm_um ON sm_um.name = (
        SELECT sm2.name
        FROM `tabStaffelmiete` sm2
        WHERE sm2.parent = mv.name
            AND sm2.parenttype = 'Mietvertrag'
            AND sm2.parentfield = 'untermietzuschlag'
            AND sm2.von <= CURDATE()
        ORDER BY sm2.von DESC, sm2.idx DESC, sm2.name DESC
        LIMIT 1
    )
JOIN
    `tabWohnungszustand` wz ON wz.name = (
        SELECT wz2.name
        FROM `tabWohnungszustand` wz2
        WHERE wz2.wohnung = w.name
            AND wz2.ab <= CURDATE()
        ORDER BY wz2.ab DESC, wz2.modified DESC, wz2.name DESC
        LIMIT 1
    )
WHERE
    w.immobilie = %(immobilie)s
    AND (mv.von IS NULL OR mv.von <= CURDATE())
    AND (mv.bis IS NULL OR mv.bis >= CURDATE())
) base
ORDER BY (wohnung='Summe'), wohnung
